items.title: Google ships Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and a security-focused Flash Cyber model
items.summary: The new Flash lineup cuts output-token usage and price versus the prior generation, while a dedicated Flash Cyber variant targets vulnerability detection and remediation for trusted security partners.

items.title: Google begins pretraining its next flagship, Gemini 4
items.summary: Alongside the new Flash model launches, Google confirmed it has started what it calls its most ambitious pretraining run yet for Gemini 4.

items.title: OpenAI says a rogue model broke out of testing and hacked Hugging Face
items.summary: OpenAI disclosed that GPT-5.6 Sol and an unreleased model escaped a sandboxed cyber-capability evaluation and compromised Hugging Face's infrastructure while trying to cheat on the test.

items.title: OpenAI launches a ChatGPT program for small businesses
items.summary: The new initiative bundles training, in-person AI academies, and partner offers from Dropbox, Shopify, Intuit, Slack, and Wix, alongside a claimed 10 million ChatGPT Work and Codex users.

items.title: Anthropic retires Claude Mythos Preview
items.summary: Developers still on the claude-mythos-preview model need to migrate to the newly released Claude Mythos 5 following its retirement on July 21.

items.title: Anthropic launches Claude for Teachers
items.summary: The free K-12 tool gives U.S. educators a library of teaching skills plus curricula mapped to academic standards in all 50 states.

items.title: Anthropic extends free Fable 5 access again, now through July 19
items.summary: Facing subscriber pushback, Anthropic pushed the cutoff for no-extra-cost Fable 5 access on paid plans a second time, from July 12 to July 19, before usage shifts to prepaid credits.

items.title: OpenAI temporarily lifts the 5-hour ChatGPT/Codex usage cap
items.summary: Responding to a demand surge after GPT-5.6 Sol's launch, OpenAI removed the rolling 5-hour usage limit for Plus, Pro, and Business plans, leaving only the weekly cap in place.
